steps.title: Give a country example
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a country that uses the word dollar in its currency name. The useful note is that Kiribati's currency is known as the Kiribati dollar.

steps.title: Exclude nonexamples and general facts
steps.content: Choice B says what Kiribati does not do, so it is not an example. Choice C explains word origin but names no country using dollar. Choice D gives a broad claim about many countries without naming one. The statement about Kiribati directly satisfies the goal. The answer is A.
